rows: ProfilePage avatar/edit workflow, auth profile API, UpdateProfileDto validation, and AuthService profile upsert path

Cover avatar-type and size validation, successful profile submission with cache sync, existing-avatar preservation, update failure handling, authenticated endpoint success, DTO validation rejection, bio-length boundary acceptance, missing-profile creation, and partial profile updates for the implemented FN-05 flow.
Profile page is in edit mode and the avatar input is available
Selected file is not an image
Valid text edits plus valid avatar file are submitted
Text edits are submitted without choosing a new avatar file
Profile update request fails because of validation, network, or server rejection
No existing profile row is found for the user
Existing profile row is found and only a subset of fields is defined
Non-image files are rejected with an error toast and avatar preview state is unchanged
Oversized images are rejected with an error toast and avatar preview state is unchanged
Successful submission sends PUT /auth/profile, refreshes profile data, and syncs cached user storage
Submitting without a new avatar preserves the previous avatarUrl while updating text fields
Failed submission surfaces an error toast and leaves the form editable after saving resets
Authenticated PUT /auth/profile returns the updated AuthResponseDto in the success wrapper
Invalid payload is rejected by DTO validation before service mutation
A 500-character bio is accepted and returned in the updated profile payload
Missing profile rows are created while user core fields are updated and the merged response is reloaded
Existing profile rows are partially updated using only defined fields and untouched data is preserved
